abilities.name: Focus
abilities.description: Hitting an enemy gains you1 stack of #@node-red Focus# has a #1s# cooldown. Each stack gives #+15%# Damage Bonus. You lose #50%# of it if you miss.

abilities.name: Crepuscular Ray
abilities.description: At #5+ @node-red Focus# if you are #+4# blocks in the air, you will fly and shoot 20 arrows per second until your @node-red #Focus# runs out. You lose #-1 @node-red Focus# every second.

abilities.name: Phantom Ray
abilities.description: @node-archer #Arrow Storm# is now a laser, with @node-pink #Decimator# @node-blue #Phantom Ray# will gain #+15%# damage up to #90%# each time you don't miss with it.

abilities.name: Coursing Restraints
abilities.description: @node-archer #Arrow Bomb# will reduce enemy resistance by #15%# for #4s# with a #10s# cooldown.

abilities.name: Repel
abilities.description: @node-archer #Arrow Shield# will gain #60%# resistance for #1s# when it loses a charge.

abilities.name: Arrow Shield
abilities.description: You want to keep this up as it provides massive defensive utility.

abilities.name: The Twilight Zone
abilities.description: Summons a bow for #8s# where if you look at enemies, it adds #+1 Twilight# to enemy every #0.05s# that increases the damage dealt by the ultimate. You can release this ultimate anytime by pressing the #Ultimate Button# again. Every enemy scanned with at least #+1 Twilight# will be hit, massive damage and AOE potential.

aspects.name: Sharpshooter's Embodiment of Laser Precision
aspects.description: Your @node-red #Focus# generates faster and it's cap is raised by 1.
